title: Hiring Software Engineer at FarmERP South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at FarmERP South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the FarmERP South Asia Partners family as a Software Engineer in Amritsar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FarmERP South Asia Partners:
FarmERP South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP South Asia Partners!
